ads.page_name: Still pouring your toner in 2025? 👀 Time to switch to the Plum CeraSense™️ Milky Toner Spray.
ads.ad_text: Still pouring your toner in 2025? 👀 Time to switch to the Plum CeraSense™️ Milky Toner Spray. Lightweight, no mess, no heaviness, no fragrance — just a fine milky mist with ceramides, peptides, prebiotics & all the calming, hydrating goodness your skin actually needs. ✨ And the best part? It’s just ₹500.
